case_title: JUAN PABLO CENTENO ARAUCO VS. KINSLEY MARIE BINARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ARAUCO, JUAN PABLO CENTENO AS TO DEFENDANT BINARD, KINSLEY MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-24-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BINARD, KINSLEY MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2020 IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. PLAINTIFF JUAN PABLO CENTENO ARAUCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KINSLEY MARIE BINARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT PROVIDES PLAINTIFF A CHECK FOR THE AMOUNT OF $477.77 TO SETTLE THIS MATTER PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
